title: How to setup Excel to Monday for Location Column input automation?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to use Excel with Lat/Lon data, and Make.com so that it fills the column “Location” automaticaly. 
I am still getting an error. It looks like I am stuck at the Item ID. How to solve?

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to use Excel with Lat/Lon data, and Make.com so that it fills the column “Location” automaticaly.

I am still getting an error. It looks like I am stuck at the Item ID. How to solve?

image2365×1249 272 KB

image1978×1282 294 KB

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Your Item ID is not a valid Item ID, You are using the item name instead of the item ID. You will need to use the monday.com module “search item by column value”, use “name” as the column ID, This will return the item ID.

Hope this helps

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: Great! It worked now! I only need to have them in exact the same order in the Excel sheet. But fist 10 items worked like a charm.
